description: Catalogo semirrealista de cursos para construir una ruta hacia Data Scientist Junior.

courses.title: Python Foundations for Data Work
courses.description: Introduces Python scripting, functions, modules, and practical exercises for data tasks.

courses.title: Practical Data Wrangling with pandas
courses.description: Covers loading, cleaning, merging, reshaping, and summarizing real tabular datasets.

courses.title: SQL for Analysts
courses.description: Builds query skills for relational datasets, joins, grouping, and reusable analysis views.

courses.title: Statistics for Decision Making
courses.description: Connects descriptive statistics, sampling, uncertainty, and hypothesis tests to analytics work.

courses.title: Communicating Data with Visualizations
courses.description: Teaches chart selection, visual polish, and concise analytical storytelling.

courses.title: Feature Engineering Workshop
courses.description: Turns cleaned datasets into model-ready features using encoding, scaling, and leakage checks.

courses.title: Applied Supervised Machine Learning
courses.description: Trains and evaluates regression and classification models with practical validation routines.

courses.title: Unsupervised Learning for Exploration
courses.description: Uses clustering and dimensionality reduction to discover structure in unlabeled data.

courses.title: Reliable Model Evaluation
courses.description: Covers metric selection, cross-validation, baselines, experiment notes, and reproducibility habits.

courses.title: End-to-End Data Science Capstone
courses.description: Builds a portfolio-ready project with a validated model, explanation, and deployment outline.
